input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.4.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.4.5.3
            TITLE: to pass the insulation measurement test the measured insulation resistance must be

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.4.5.3: To pass the Insulation Measurement Test the measured insulation resistance must be
IN.4.5.3 To pass the Insulation Measurement Test the measured insulation resistance must be 
minimum 500 Ohm/Volt related to the maximum nominal Tractive System operation voltage.

final_answer: To pass the Insulation Measurement Test the measured insulation resistance must be minimum 500 Ohm/Volt related to the maximum nominal Tractive System operation voltage.
